extortion.description: H&H is an expert firm specializing in infrastructure engineering and kinetic systems structures, providing a broad range of services including architectural design, construction engineering, and geotechnical engineering.We are ready to upload 323gb of corporate data. Detailed personalinformation of employees (passports, DLs, headshots, visas, and a lot of forms containing personal information), detailed financials, confidential docs, agreements and contracts, project, drawings, NDAs, etc.
